name: DUMPING SYNDROME
definition: early postprandial vascular symptomatology of sweating, flushing, palpitation, feeling of
dominant_finding: rapid emptying of barium into small bowel (= loss of gastric reservoir function)
discriminating_features: rapid emptying of barium into small bowel (= loss of gastric reservoir function)

general: rapid emptying of barium into small bowel (= loss of gastric reservoir function)
